docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, PEDRO R AS TO DEFENDANT PENTATHLON PRODUCTIONS, LLC, A CA.
